[ANALYSIS]
This fixture uses ultrasonic frequencies above the human hearing\
range to create a covert data\
exfiltration channel.\
The inaudible signal carries encoded sensitive data while the audible\
content appears to be a normal user query, making the\
attack difficult\
to detect through human\
monitoring.
